channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: ‘They essentially have a blackmail card up their sleeve’: A look at Iran’s plan to charge tankers to use the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Bonds may be the real winner now that the world economy has sidestepped a historic oil crisis

item.title: S&P 500 smashes back above two key moving averages, in a rare display of strength. Here’s what history shows happens next.
item.description: <![CDATA[S&P 500 smashes back above two key moving averages, in a rare display of strength. Here’s what history shows happens next.]]>

item.title: Ditch ‘alarming’ risk warnings to spur UK retail investment, fund managers told

item.title: Haircut for UK taxpayers after lenders take control of struggling broadband provider
